productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Peach Top
description: CompositionPeachy pink round neck top made of satin, and has batwing sleeves with an elasticated midriffFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergentDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleachDry flat in shadeWarm iron do not iron directly on print/embroideryLadies, time to stock up your wardrobe with vintage style off-duty essentials like this top from united colors of benetton. Perfect for layering, or for a laid-back casual look styled minimalistically with jeans, this top is sure to become a love-forever piece in your closet.
